en.value:
Conduct technical education and vocational skills training (TEVT) and entrepreneurship development training with gender equality approach, psychosocial support to out-of school adolescent girls and young women from conflict affected families in Rautahat and Sarlahi Districts, 2.1.4b.3  Increase substantive capacity of CSOs and migrant women's organizations to advocate for implementation of standard terms of employment ,

Provide technical support to the Government of Nepal (MoPR, MoWCSW, MoFALD, MoHA and other relevant government agencies) on women, peace and security agenda, especially for the development of NAP II phase as part of the joint UN initiatives and the Peace Support Working Group (PSWG), drawing on the recommendations of the Global Study on UNSCR 1325 and focusing on issues like conflict related sexual violence (CRSV), victim centric gender responsive programs and gender sensitive transitional justice 

Continue to provide technical support to the key government agencies (National Reconstruction Authority (NRA) to mainstream GESI in the reconstruction interventions and disaster risk reduction (DRR) efforts in Nepal and support to roll out ERP gender package in close collaboration with UN OCHA  

Provide technical support with team of legal and gender expert to the MoWCSW to draft and conduct consultation inclusive manner for finalizing new laws on Gender equality: violence against women bill and special opportunity bill.

en.full: Support to UN Women Nepal Country Office Annual Work Plan 2017 (Outcome area 2, 4 and 5): Advancing Resilience and Empowerment [ARE Project] - 00103966

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
